0.content:
# 🛡️ Active Directory — Executive Summary
Top-level summary across all AD monitoring areas. Each section below corresponds to a dedicated deep-dive dashboard.

3.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4624")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| summarize event_count = count()

5.query:

| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4625")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| summarize event_count = count()

10.title: Logon Success vs Failure
10.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4624") OR matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4625")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| fieldsAdd EventType = if(winlog.eventid == "4624", "Success", else: "Failure")
| makeTimeseries count(), by: EventType, time:{timestamp}, interval:5m

41.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4625")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| parse content, """LD:'logcontent'EOL
LD EOL
LD EOL
LD SPACE LD ':' LD: 'Subject_SecurityID' EOL
LD ':' LD: 'Subject_AccountName' EOL
LD ':' LD: 'Subject_AccountDomain' EOL
LD ':' LD: 'Subject_Logon_ID' EOL
LD EOL
LD ':' LD: 'Logon_LogonType' EOL
LD EOL
LD:'AccountForWhichFailed'EOL
LD ':' LD: 'NewLogon_SecurityID' EOL
LD ':' LD: 'NewLogon_AccountName' EOL
LD ':' LD: 'NewLogon_AccountDOmain' EOL
LD EOL
LD:'FailureInfo'EOL
LD ':' LD: 'FailureReason ' EOL
LD ':' LD: 'Status ' EOL
LD ":" LD: 'SubStatus' EOL
LD EOL
LD:'ProcessInfo'EOL
LD ':' LD: 'Process_ProcessID' EOL
LD ':' LD: 'Process_ProcessName' EOL
LD EOL
LD ':' LD: 'Network_Workstation_Name' EOL
LD ':' LD: 'Network_SourceNetworkAddress' EOL
LD ':' LD: 'Network_SourcePort' EOL
LD EOL
LD EOL
LD ':' LD: 'Auth_LogonProcess' EOL
LD ':' LD: 'Auth_AuthenticationPackage' EOL
LD ':' LD: 'Auth_TransitedServices' EOL
LD ':' LD: 'Auth_Package_Name' EOL
LD ':' LD: 'Auth_KeyLength' EOL
LD EOL"""
| fields AccountName=NewLogon_AccountName
| filterOut contains(AccountName, "$")
| summarize FailCount = count(), by:AccountName
| sort FailCount desc

43.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4740")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| parse content, """DATA 'Account That Was Locked Out:' DATA:AccountSID_Name 'Additional Information:'"""
| summarize LockoutCount = count(), by:AccountSID_Name
| sort LockoutCount desc

45.query:
fetch logs //, scanLimitGBytes: 500, samplingRatio: 1000
| filter matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4728") OR matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4732") OR matchesValue(winlog.eventid, "4756")
| filterout matchesPhrase(content, "The EventSystem sub system is suppressing duplicate event log entries for a duration of 86400 seconds")
| parse content, """DATA 'Account Name:\t\t' DATA:WhichAccountCompletedTheAdd EOL
DATA 'Account Domain:\t\t' DATA:WhichDomain EOL
DATA 'Account Name:\t\t' DATA:WhoWasAdded EOL
DATA 'Group Name:\t\t' DATA:AddedToWhatGroup EOL"""
| filter WhoWasAdded != "-\n"
| filter contains(AddedToWhatGroup, "Domain Admins") OR contains(AddedToWhatGroup, "Enterprise Admins") OR contains(AddedToWhatGroup, "Schema Admins")
| fields timestamp, WhoWasAdded, AddedToWhatGroup, WhichAccountCompletedTheAdd, WhichDomain
| sort timestamp desc

47.query:
fetch dt.entity.host
| expand tags, alias:tag
| filter tag == "Application:ActiveDirectory"
| fieldsAdd hostGroupName  
| filterOut isMonitoringCandidate == true or standalone == true
| lookup [
timeseries m1=max(dt.host.availability, rollup: sum),
filter:availability.state == "up",
by:{availability.state,dt.entity.host},from: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_from), to: toTimestamp($dt_timeframe_to)-2m
| parse replaceString(toString(m1),"null","0"), """'['ARRAY{ DOUBLE:i ', '}{1,10000}:m1Pop"""
| fieldsAdd intervalToMinutes = toLong(interval)/60000000000 
| fieldsAdd availability= toDouble(arraySum(m1Pop)/(arraySize(m1Pop))*100)/intervalToMinutes],
sourceField: id, lookupField: dt.entity.host, fields: {availability}
| fields Name=entity.name, dt.entity.host = id, `Availability %`=coalesce(availability, 0)
| sort `Availability %` asc

48.title: Network traffic across all hosts

leftYAxisSettings.label: NIC bytes received • NIC bytes sent on host
